going down, then after a random delay, the output goes low. When the sinewave crosses the highThreshold going up, then after another random delay, the output goes high. This is an explicitly Monte Carlo model corresponding to a common hybrid system

stic models be explicitly given as Monte Carlo models. State machine with one state for each output value plus a state that models the time it takes to make a transition. In this model, the time it takes to make the transition is random. It is unifor
